item.title:
Is it me or X starting to look like a vibe coded mess?
Polls are broken.
Accounts are getting hack...
item.description:
Is it me or X starting to look like a vibe coded mess?
Polls are broken.
Accounts are getting hacked.
My DMs are full of phishing scams.
Basics that used to work no longer work.
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 9 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 398
item.author: @GaryMarcus

item.title: I'm not a weight lifter by any means but every time I workout I ask Codex to make some improvements ...
item.description:
I'm not a weight lifter by any means but every time I workout I ask Codex to make some improvements to my personal fitness app and over time I'm confident it'll be better for me than any app in the App Store.
At some point I'll share it with some of y'all :)
--- @petergyang | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 601
item.author: @petergyang
